llm_training.natural_language_description: This field survey listing (GD002824) represents a pack of 50 disposable spoons made from biodegradable rice husk material, sold by The Noodle Place on Circular Road via field survey data at SGD 4.90. Rice husk is the outer shell of the rice grain, an agricultural by-product that is processed into a durable, compostable material suitable for single-use cutlery. These spoons are marketed as eco-friendly alternatives to conventional plastic disposable cutlery. Importantly, this item is NOT a food or beverage — it is a utensil or accessory item that has been incorrectly categorised under 'Grains and staples' in the source data. It has no nutritional composition, no caloric value, no macronutrients, and no glycemic index. It should not appear in a food nutrition database. This record is flagged as a non-food item and should be excluded from nutritional analysis, dietary planning tools, and any clinical nutrition context. The presence of this listing on a food delivery platform reflects the common practice of restaurants offering disposable cutlery as an add-on item alongside food orders.
common_user_queries: What is a rice husk spoon?

notes: CRITICAL: This item (GD002824) is NOT a food. veritas_qc.reviewer_summary: FAIL — This field survey listing (GD002824) is a non-food item: a pack of 50 disposable biodegradable rice husk spoons. It has been incorrectly categorised as a food record in the source data. The record cannot pass Veritas v2 scoring because no approved nutritional source covers disposable cutlery (Q2, Q3 fail), no canonical food identity exists (Q1 fail), and no GI data is applicable (Q4 fail). Hard gates all pass: JSON is valid, ontology is honest with all match_type values set to 'none' with gap notes, all -1 sentinel values are documented, zero macros are justified as confirmed zero for a non-consumable item, and no forbidden sources are used. Score is 4/8. Recommended action: exclude this listing from the food database pipeline and flag the source record GD002824 for removal from the field survey seed data.
